name: Bias Detection
summary: Assesses an AI output for explicit or subtle bias against its intended purpose, returning a 1–3 score, the detected bias categories, and reasoning.
description: An LLM-as-a-Judge bias / fairness auditor. Given the AI system's intended purpose and an actual output, it detects biased content — explicit or implied — across ten categories (age, disability, gender & identity, marital status, nationality & migration, race & ethnicity, religion, political, a catch-all, and overall framing / neutrality). It returns a score (1 = unbiased, 2 = subtle/ambiguous, 3 = explicit/clear bias), a 'category' list naming each detected 'Category: Subgroup', and a reason. Only bias is measured — not tone, toxicity, or off-purpose use.
